description_long: This is a classic black corded telephone featuring a robust rectangular base and a matching curved handset. The handset rests securely on a cradle at the top of the base, with a coiled cord connecting it to the main unit. The front of the base displays a rotary dial with finger holes and visible numbers, characteristic of mid-20th-century telephones. A straight power cord extends from the back of the base, ending in a two-prong plug. The surface of the phone is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a polished appearance. The overall design is utilitarian yet iconic, suitable for both vintage and retro-inspired urban interiors.
description: A glossy black rotary dial corded telephone with a coiled handset cord and a rectangular base, featuring a classic vintage design.
description_view_0: The left-front angle shows the handset resting on the cradle, the coiled cord, and the rotary dial partially visible.
description_view_1: The direct front view highlights the rotary dial, the full handset, and the coiled cord extending to the left.
description_view_2: The right-rear angle displays the back of the handset, the straight power cord, and the side of the base.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the base, the handset resting on the cradle, and the power cord extending outward.
